rationale: r0c4's SoC (21%) is above your minimum threshold (25%) and microgrid systemic crisis requires strict conservation; defer non-critical requests until grid recovery signal or load-shedding confirmation.

user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=['r2c4'].
Your latest belief: Microgrid systemic crisis; all peers in deficit. r1c4 SoC critically low (11%). r2c4 actively blocking shares. Expect grid reconnection signal within next 30 minutes or prepare for controlled load shedding..
